hooks.command: bash -c 'if [ ! -d ~/.claude/plugins/cache/everything-claude-code ]; then echo "[jkit] WARNING: ECC plugin is required. Run: /plugin install ecc@ecc" >&2; fi'
hooks.description: Check ECC plugin dependency on session start

hooks.command: bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); COMMAND=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".tool_input.command // empty"); if echo "$COMMAND" | grep -qiE "(DROP\s+DATABASE|TRUNCATE\s+TABLE|DELETE\s+FROM\s+\S+\s*;)"; then if echo "$COMMAND" | grep -qiE "(-h\s+|-host[= ]\s*|--host[= ]\s*)" && ! echo "$COMMAND" | grep -qiE "(-h\s+|-host[= ]\s*|--host[= ]\s*)(localhost|127\.0\.0\.1)"; then echo "차단: 외부 DB에 대한 삭제 명령어가 감지되었습니다."; exit 2; fi; fi; exit 0'
hooks.description: Block DROP DATABASE / TRUNCATE / DELETE on external hosts

hooks.command: bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); COMMAND=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".tool_input.command // empty"); if echo "$COMMAND" | grep -qE "chmod\s+0?777"; then echo "차단: chmod 777은 보안 정책에 의해 금지되었습니다."; exit 2; fi; exit 0'
